roscopic Delineation' he observes: "lfi aban
doned all others, I would at least retain the 1 deg. to a year
measure". Dutt proposed that 3 deg . 36' to be added per every

Directions: Limitations 103
year after birth. Dutt got this arc by dividng the total degrees
of the zodiac by one hundred. If we can divide it by 100, we
have a better justification to divide it by 120 which is at the
basis of the Vimshottari system. Actually we step into the land
of symbolism when we take up directional progression. Any
such symbolical progression must apply uniformly to every
house and to every planet in any given nativity.
When the individual is born, he has a certain configura
tion of planets and other astral bodies; and these are with the
individual. As he grows, so do they. This rate of growth de
pends on the intellectual, moral and spiritual growth of the in
dividual. On the purely physical plane the rate of growth can
be a fixed unit per year'. But man is more than a physical
object.
